english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
Al Fajr – The Dawn

By the Dawn,
Al Fajr – The Dawn

by the ten nights,
Al Fajr – The Dawn

by the Even and the Odd,
Al Fajr – The Dawn

by the night when it departs!
Al Fajr – The Dawn

arabic text: هَلْ فِي ذَٰلِكَ قَسَمٌ لِّذِي حِجْرٍ
english translation text:
Is there an oath in that for one possessing intellect?
Al Fajr – The Dawn

arabic text: أَلَمْ تَرَ كَيْفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِعَادٍ
english translation text:
Have you not regarded how your Lord dealt with [the people of] ‘Ad,
Al Fajr – The Dawn

[and] Iram, [the city] of the pillars,
Al Fajr – The Dawn

arabic text: الَّتِي لَمْ يُخْلَقْ مِثْلُهَا فِي الْبِلَادِ
english translation text:
the like of which was not created among cities,
Al Fajr – The Dawn

and [the people of] Thamud, who hollowed out the rocks in the valley,
Al Fajr – The Dawn

and Pharaoh, the impaler
Al Fajr – The Dawn

—those who rebelled [against Allah] in their cities
Al Fajr – The Dawn

and caused much corruption in them,
Al Fajr – The Dawn

so your Lord poured on them lashes of punishment.
Al Fajr – The Dawn

Indeed your Lord is in ambush.
Al Fajr – The Dawn

arabic text: فَأَمَّا الْإِنسَانُ إِذَا مَا ابْتَلَاهُ رَبُّهُ فَأَكْرَمَهُ وَنَعَّمَهُ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّي أَكْرَمَنِ
english translation text:
As for man, whenever his Lord tests him, and grants him honour, and blesses him, he says, ‘My Lord has honoured me.’
Al Fajr – The Dawn

arabic text: وَأَمَّا إِذَا مَا ابْتَلَاهُ فَقَدَرَ عَلَيْهِ رِزْقَهُ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّي أَهَانَنِ
english translation text:
But when He tests him and tightens for him his provision, he says, ‘My Lord has humiliated me.’
Al Fajr – The Dawn

No indeed! No, you do not honour the orphan,
Al Fajr – The Dawn

and do not urge the feeding of the needy.
Al Fajr – The Dawn

You eat the inheritance rapaciously,
Al Fajr – The Dawn

and love wealth with much fondness.
Al Fajr – The Dawn

arabic text: كَلَّا إِذَا دُكَّتِ الْأَرْضُ دَكًّا دَكًّا
english translation text:
No indeed! When the earth is levelled to a plain,
Al Fajr – The Dawn

and your Lord [’s edict] arrives with the angels in ranks,
Al Fajr – The Dawn

arabic text: وَجِيءَ يَوْمَئِذٍ بِجَهَنَّمَ ۚ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَتَذَكَّرُ الْإِنسَانُ وَأَنَّىٰ لَهُ الذِّكْرَىٰ
english translation text:
the day when hell is brought [near], man will take admonition on that day, but what will that admonition avail him?
Al Fajr – The Dawn

He will say, ‘Alas, had I sent ahead for my life [in the Hereafter]!’
Al Fajr – The Dawn

On that day none shall punish as He punishes,
Al Fajr – The Dawn

and none shall bind as He binds.
Al Fajr – The Dawn

‘O soul at peace!
Al Fajr – The Dawn

Return to your Lord, pleased and pleasing!
Al Fajr – The Dawn

Then enter among My servants,
Al Fajr – The Dawn

and enter My paradise!’
Al Fajr – The Dawn
